section_title: Power of Court to adopt proceeding of voluntary winding up.-- Where a company is being wound up voluntary
content:
315. Power of Court to adopt proceeding of voluntary winding up.-- Where a company is being wound up voluntary
and an order is made for winding up by the Court, the Court may, if it think fit, by the same or subsequent order, provide for
the adoption of all or any of the proceedings in the voluntary winding up and also for any incidental on consequent situation.
Winding up subject to supervision of Court
